name: Miraidon
description: An futuristic electro-relic observed in the Great Crater of Paldea. Its carbon-fiber skin glows with artificial stellar energy.
originLore: Miraidon is a future-relic electro-dragon witnessed in Paldea's Great Crater. Carbon-fiber skin channels artificial stellar current through a Hadron Engine.

lore.celestialConcordance: Miraidon's engine rewrites the battlefield into Electric Terrain, accelerating every allied circuit.

quantumResonators.name: Electro Drift
quantumResonators.description: Rides charged rails of its own making at near-instant traversal.

quantumResonators.name: Hadron Engine
quantumResonators.description: Floods the field with electric terrain resonance.
